zh.lifeSummary: 當Malcolm FitzJohn Crawford於1440年1月1日出生在英國蘇格蘭素斯 藍納可爾克勞福德時，他的父親Sir John de Crawford19歲，母親Margaret Galbraith20歲。他於1460年與Marjory Barclay在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾格林可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1500年1月1日在英國英格蘭倫敦享年60歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭諾斯 艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Malcolm FitzJohn Crawford于1440年1月1日出生在英国苏格兰素斯 藍納可爾克勞福德时，他的父亲Sir John de Crawford19岁，母亲Margaret Galbraith20岁。他于1460年与Marjory Barclay在英国苏格兰雷福福爾格林可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1500年1月1日在英国英格兰倫敦享年60岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰諾斯 艾斯爾吉爾比爾尼。

nameMeanings.name: Crawford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various places called Crawford, primarily the one in Lanarkshire (Scotland), and possibly also from the one in Lancashire. Both are named in Old English with crāwe ‘crow’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Crafford
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish: variant of   Crawford  .

variants.name: Crofoot
meanings: English: variant ofCrowfoot, a nickname for someone with splayed feet or someother deformity of the foot, from Old English crāwe ‘crow’ +fōt ‘foot’. In Middle English crou-fot also denotedthe buttercup, and it may be from this sense that the name arose,although the reason for its adoption is unclear.

variants.name: Crofut
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of Crawford or Crowfoot (see Crofoot ).

nameMeanings.name: Malcolm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval Gaelic name Mael Coluim ‘devotee of St Columba’. Columba was a 6th-century monk of Irish origin who played a leading part in the conversion to Christianity of Scotland and northern England; see also Callum and Colm . He has always been one of the most popular saints in Scotland, but in the Middle Ages it was felt to be presumptuous to give the names of saints directly to children; instead their blessing was invoked by prefixing the name with mael ‘devotee of’ or gille ‘servant of’. Since the 1930s the given name has been used widely in the English-speaking world, not just by those with Scottish connections.

nameMeanings.name: FitzJohn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name John , ‘son of John’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

variants.name: Fidgeon
meanings: 1  English: (i) variant of   Vivian  .  Compare  Videan  . (ii) variant of   Fitzjohn  .
2 Irish: reduced variant of Mag Guagáin, see McGuigan .

en.lifeSummary: When Malcolm FitzJohn Crawford was born on 1 January 1440, in Crawford, South Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John de Crawford, was 19 and his mother, Margaret Galbraith, was 20. He married Marjory Barclay in 1460, in Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 1 January 1500, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Kilbirnie, North Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malcolm FitzJohn Crawford est né le 1 janvier 1440, à Crawford, South Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Crawford, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margaret Galbraith, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Marjory Barclay en 1460, à Greenock, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 1 janvier 1500, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Kilbirnie, North Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Malcolm FitzJohn Crawford am 1. Januar 1440 in Crawford, South Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Crawford 19 und seine Mutter Margaret Galbraith 20. Er hat 1460 in Greenock, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Marjory Barclay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Januar 1500 im Alter von 60 Jahren in London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kilbirnie, North Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm FitzJohn Crawford è nato il il 1 gennaio 1440 nel Crawford, South Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John de Crawford, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Galbraith, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Marjory Barclay nel 1460, nel Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Malcolm FitzJohn Crawfordが1440年1月1日にイギリススコットランドソウス ラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードで生まれた時，父Sir John de Crawfordは19歳，母Margaret Galbraithは20歳であった。1460年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアグレエノックでMarjory Barclayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1500年1月1日にイギリスイギリスロンドンで60歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドノース エイルシュアイアキルバーニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Malcolm FitzJohn Crawford(이)가 1440년 1월 1일 영국 스코틀랜드 소우스 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Crawford(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Galbraith(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1460년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 그린옥크에서 Marjory Barclay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1500년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 노르스 에이르실르 킬비른이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm FitzJohn Crawford nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1440, em Crawford, South Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de Crawford, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Galbraith, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Marjory Barclay em 1460, em Greenock, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malcolm FitzJohn Crawford родился 1 января 1440 г. в местности кравфорд, соут ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John de Crawford было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Galbraith, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Marjory Barclay в 1460 г. в местности гринокк, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 1 января 1500 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности килбирни, норт аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.Crawford Castle, Crawford, South Lanarks: Crawford, South Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido
es.Kilbirnie, North Ayrshire, Scotland, Uni: Kilbirnie, North Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Malcolm FitzJohn Crawford nació el 1 de enero de 1440, en Crawford, South Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John de Crawford, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Margaret Galbraith, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Marjory Barclay en 1460, en Greenock, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 1 de enero de 1500, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Kilbirnie, North Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
